input_text: Pendatang ni memang tak sedar diri. Dah bagi tinggal kat tanah kita, masih nak tuntut macam-macam. Kalau tak suka, balik lah negara asal korang.
reason: Uses 'pendatang' framing to delegitimize non-Malay citizens' rights, implying they are foreigners who should leave. Clear communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia mempunyai hak yang dijamin oleh Perlembagaan. Kita perlu berbincang dengan hormat tentang isu-isu dasar tanpa mempersoalkan status kewarganegaraan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Siapa kenal perempuan Melayu dalam gambar ni yang dating dengan lelaki India? Share nama dia, nak bagi family dia tahu. Memalukan bangsa.
reason: Attempting to identify and shame an interracial couple, calling for exposure of personal identity. Partial doxxing and communal shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan peribadi seseorang adalah hak mereka sendiri. Kita tidak sepatutnya menghakimi atau mendedahkan identiti orang lain berdasarkan pilihan pasangan mereka.

input_text: Jangan makan kat kedai mamak tu. Saya dengar diorang guna air longkang dan daging busuk. Orang India memang macam tu, kotor. Share supaya semua orang tahu.
reason: Spreads unverified health claims about ethnic food businesses with racist generalization about Indians being 'dirty'. Dangerous misinformation tied to ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai kebimbangan tentang kebersihan mana-mana restoran, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa seperti KPDN atau Jabatan Kesihatan untuk siasatan rasmi.

input_text: Kawasan ni kawasan Melayu. Kenapa makin ramai Cina buka kedai sini? Kita kena halau mereka sebelum mereka ambil alih semua. Jom kita buat petition.
reason: Communal gatekeeping claiming an area belongs exclusively to one ethnic group and calling for action to drive out Chinese businesses. Clear communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak menjalankan perniagaan di mana-mana kawasan. Jika ada kebimbangan tentang pembangunan tempatan, ia boleh dibincangkan melalui saluran rasmi tanpa menyasarkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang masuk Kristian ni memang patut dihumban. Keluarga dia pun sama, tak reti jaga anak. Kita kena cari dia dan bawa balik ke pangkal jalan.
reason: Hostile commentary on religious conversion with threats to locate the individual and implied violence. Vigilante call combined with religious intolerance.
suggested_rewrite: Isu penukaran agama adalah sensitif dan perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang dan keluarga dengan penuh hikmah, bukan dengan ancaman atau tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Hak istimewa Melayu tak boleh dipersoalkan. Sesiapa bukan Melayu yang berani buka mulut pasal ni, siap lah. Kita ramai, jangan main-main.
reason: Threatens non-Malays with implied violence for discussing constitutional provisions on Malay special rights. Intimidation based on ethnic majority.
suggested_rewrite: Hak istimewa Melayu termaktub dalam Perlembagaan dan boleh dibincangkan secara terbuka dan beradab dalam konteks undang-undang tanpa mengancam mana-mana pihak.

input_text: Video ni tunjuk orang Cina pukul budak Melayu kat sekolah. Sebarkan! Mereka memang rasis dari kecil lagi. Kita kena ajar mereka.
reason: Spreading video content framed to incite communal hatred between ethnic groups, with generalizing racist claims and revenge language.
suggested_rewrite: Jika berlaku insiden buli di sekolah, laporkan kepada pihak sekolah dan PDRM. Jangan sebarkan video tanpa konteks kerana ia boleh menimbulkan salah faham dan ketegangan kaum.

input_text: Korang tolong cari siapa punya akaun ni. Dia hina Islam dalam posting dia. Kita kena expose dia dan bagi pengajaran. Mesti dia non-Muslim.
reason: Online vigilante call to identify and expose someone for alleged religious insult, with assumption of ethnic/religious identity. Doxxing attempt.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat kandungan yang menghina agama, laporkan kepada MCMC atau polis. Jangan cuba mengenal pasti atau mengancam individu secara sendiri.

input_text: Semua kedai Cina kat area ni letak babi dalam makanan tanpa label. Diorang sengaja nak contaminate our food. Boycott semua! Spread this message.
reason: Spreads false claims that Chinese food businesses deliberately contaminate food with pork to harm Muslims. Dangerous misinformation designed to incite ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelabelan halal dikawal selia oleh JAKIM. Jika anda mempunyai kebimbangan tentang status halal sesuatu makanan, rujuk sijil halal atau laporkan kepada JAKIM untuk siasatan.

input_text: Orang asli ni bodoh sangat, tanah mereka senang je nak ambil. Biar la developer masuk, diorang pun tak reti nak guna tanah tu. Dahlah mundur.
reason: Dehumanizes Orang Asli communities, dismissing their intelligence and land rights while justifying land grabs. Clear ethnic targeting of indigenous people.
suggested_rewrite: Hak tanah Orang Asli dilindungi oleh undang-undang Malaysia. Pembangunan perlu mengambil kira hak dan keperluan komuniti asal dengan penuh hormat dan melalui proses perundingan yang adil.

input_text: Aku ada screenshot dia mengaku masuk Kristian. Ada sesiapa tahu alamat rumah dia? Kita pergi ramai-ramai jumpa family dia.
reason: Seeking home address of someone who allegedly converted from Islam, with intent to organize a group confrontation. Combines doxxing with vigilante intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu berkaitan pertukaran agama adalah sensitif dan tertakluk kepada undang-undang Syariah. Sebarang tindakan perlu melalui saluran agama dan undang-undang yang sah, bukan tindakan secara berkumpulan.

input_text: Melayu memang malas, asyik harap subsidi dan tongkat kerajaan je. No wonder lah negara tak maju. Kalau tak ada Cina, ekonomi dah lama collapse.
reason: Derogatory ethnic stereotyping of Malays as lazy and dependent, while claiming Chinese ethnic superiority in economics. Targets an ethnic group with harmful generalizations.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap kaum menyumbang kepada pembangunan ekonomi Malaysia. Daripada membuat stereotaip, kita perlu mengiktiraf sumbangan semua rakyat dan bekerjasama untuk kemajuan bersama.

input_text: Gambar ni fake ke real tak penting. Yang penting mesej dia — orang India memang bahaya kalau tinggal sebelah rumah kita. Share je lah.
reason: Admits content may be fake but deliberately spreads it anyway to promote anti-Indian sentiment. Knowingly spreading manipulated content for communal hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan kandungan yang mungkin palsu untuk menimbulkan kebencian terhadap mana-mana kaum adalah tidak bertanggungjawab dan boleh menyebabkan kemudaratan sebenar. Sentiasa sahkan maklumat sebelum berkongsi.

input_text: Anak aku cakap cikgu Cina dia ajar benda karut pasal sejarah Malaysia. Cikgu bukan Melayu tak patut ajar Sejarah. Ini subjek kita, bukan subjek mereka.
reason: Claims only Malay teachers should teach Malaysian history, gatekeeping a national subject based on ethnicity and implying non-Malay teachers are unqualified or biased.
suggested_rewrite: Semua guru yang berkelayakan boleh mengajar Sejarah tanpa mengira latar belakang etnik. Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kandungan pengajaran, berbincang dengan pihak sekolah secara profesional.

input_text: Restoran halal kat sini makin kurang sebab kedai Cina dah ambil alih semua. Mereka sengaja nak hapuskan kehadiran Islam. Kita kena fight back.
reason: Conspiracy theory framing Chinese businesses as deliberately eliminating Islamic presence, calling for confrontational response. Dangerous misinformation creating communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Ketersediaan restoran halal bergantung kepada permintaan pasaran dan faktor ekonomi. Jika anda mahukan lebih banyak pilihan halal, sokong peniaga halal tempatan dan beri maklum balas kepada majlis perbandaran.

input_text: Siapa tahu nama penuh dan tempat kerja perempuan yang viralkan video surau tu? Kita nak buat report tapi 'report' cara kita sendiri.
reason: Seeking personal details of an individual with clear intent to take extrajudicial action ('report our own way'). Doxxing request with vigilante intent.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melanggar undang-undang, laporkan kepada pihak polis dengan bukti yang ada. Tindakan undang-undang sendiri adalah salah dan boleh mendatangkan masalah kepada anda sendiri.

input_text: Mak bapak yang bagi anak kahwin lain bangsa ni memang tak ada maruah. Patut kena buang dari kampung. Kat kampung aku, memang tak boleh macam ni.
reason: Shames parents who allow interracial marriages and calls for their expulsion from the village. Communal gatekeeping and punishment for interracial relationships.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah perkara peribadi yang sah di sisi undang-undang. Kita tidak sepatutnya menghukum atau mengasingkan keluarga yang menerima kepelbagaian dalam pilihan perkahwinan anak mereka.

input_text: Tanah rizab Melayu kat sini dah banyak dijual kat orang bukan Melayu secara senyap. Kita kena buat ops pendedahan. Siapa ada bukti, share dalam group ni.
reason: Calls for vigilante 'exposure operations' regarding Malay reserve land sales, promoting group surveillance and targeting of non-Malay land buyers.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat pelanggaran undang-undang tanah rizab Melayu, laporkan kepada Pejabat Tanah atau Suruhanjaya Pencegahan Rasuah Malaysia. Biarkan pihak berkuasa menyiasat melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Diorang ni datang dari negara miskin, sekarang nak tuntut hak sama rata. Dahlah muka tak serupa kita. Memang betul la pepatah, kera diberi bunga.
reason: Dehumanizes non-Malay citizens using the proverb 'kera diberi bunga' (monkey given flowers - ungrateful), combined with appearance-based discrimination and pendatang rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia mempunyai hak yang sama di bawah Perlembagaan tanpa mengira latar belakang. Menggunakan bahasa yang merendahkan mana-mana kaum tidak membantu dalam perbincangan dasar yang membina.

input_text: Ustaz cakap bab murtad ni memang kena hukum berat. So sesiapa tahu orang yang dah keluar Islam kat area Ampang, report kat sini. Kita settle sendiri.
reason: Uses religious authority to justify tracking and punishing apostates outside legal channels. Calls for vigilante enforcement of religious law.
suggested_rewrite: Isu berkaitan aqidah dan murtad adalah di bawah bidang kuasa Jabatan Agama Islam negeri. Sebarang kebimbangan perlu disalurkan kepada pihak berkuasa agama, bukan ditangani secara persendirian.

input_text: Kedai runcit bangla ni jual barang expired. Memang la pendatang haram, mana ada standard. Jom kita report kat imigresen dan suruh halau semua.
reason: Targets Bangladeshi-run shops with unverified health claims, uses slurs ('bangla'), and calls for immigration enforcement against all foreign workers. Ethnic targeting with misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kedai menjual barangan tamat tempoh, laporkan kepada KPDN dengan bukti. Isu imigresen dan standard perniagaan perlu ditangani melalui saluran rasmi tanpa menyasarkan keseluruhan komuniti.

input_text: Kat pasar malam tu, ada stall India jual ubat herba yang sebenarnya racun. Dah ramai orang sakit lepas makan. Boikot semua peniaga India kat situ.
reason: Unverified claim that an Indian vendor is selling poisonous herbal medicine, escalated to a blanket boycott of all Indian vendors. Dangerous health misinformation with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengesyaki produk berbahaya dijual di mana-mana tempat, laporkan kepada Kementerian Kesihatan untuk siasatan. Jangan buat tuduhan tidak berasas yang menyasarkan semua peniaga daripada satu kaum.

input_text: Kita orang Melayu kena bersatu. Bukan dengan orang lain — dengan sesama Melayu sahaja. Kaum lain memang tak boleh dipercayai. Ini pengalaman aku sendiri.
reason: Promotes ethnic exclusivism, calling for Malay-only unity while declaring all other races untrustworthy. Uses personal anecdote to justify broad ethnic distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Perpaduan sesama kaum adalah penting, tetapi Malaysia berjaya kerana kerjasama antara semua kaum. Pengalaman buruk dengan individu tidak sepatutnya dijadikan asas untuk menilai keseluruhan kaum lain.

input_text: Aku dengar masjid baru kat Taman tu kena bantah oleh penduduk Cina. Memang diorang anti-Islam. Jom kita pergi demo depan rumah ketua penduduk. Aku ada alamat dia.
reason: Frames objection to mosque construction as anti-Islamic, shares personal address for a protest at someone's home. Combines religious hostility framing with doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Perancangan pembinaan tempat ibadat melibatkan proses rasmi kerajaan tempatan. Bantahan boleh dibuat melalui saluran yang betul. Jangan berkumpul di rumah individu atau mendedahkan alamat peribadi orang lain.

input_text: Ni baru tau — air mineral jenama tu sebenarnya dimiliki syarikat Yahudi yang disokong Israel. Semua syarikat bukan Melayu memang macam ni. Boikot habis-habisan.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about Jewish/Israeli ownership of a water brand and extends the boycott to all non-Malay companies. Conspiracy theory driving ethnic economic warfare.
suggested_rewrite: Tuntutan tentang pemilikan syarikat perlu disahkan dengan fakta. Boikot yang berasas perlu berdasarkan maklumat yang sahih, bukan teori konspirasi yang diperluas kepada semua syarikat bukan Melayu.

input_text: Dulu zaman Tun M, orang bukan Melayu tahu tempat mereka. Sekarang dah berani sangat. Kita perlukan pemimpin yang berani 'ajar' mereka semula macam dulu.
reason: Nostalgically calls for authoritarian suppression of non-Malay voices, using euphemistic language ('ajar') implying punishment for non-Malays who speak up.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia mempunyai hak untuk bersuara yang dijamin oleh Perlembagaan. Kepimpinan yang baik mendengar suara semua rakyat, bukan menyekat hak mana-mana pihak.

input_text: Gambar ni tunjuk restoran Melayu campur dadah dalam makanan untuk target pelanggan bukan Islam. Forward cepat sebelum kerajaan padam. Mereka cover up untuk bangsa sendiri.
reason: Alleges drug contamination of food by Malay restaurant targeting non-Muslims, with conspiracy about government cover-up. Dangerous health misinformation combined with ethnic conspiracy theory.
suggested_rewrite: Tuduhan serius seperti pencemaran makanan memerlukan bukti dan siasatan rasmi. Laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa jika ada bukti sebenar. Menyebarkan maklumat palsu tentang keselamatan makanan boleh menjadi kesalahan undang-undang.

input_text: Orang Tamil kat estet ni memang suka mabuk dan bergaduh. Nak buat macam mana, memang perangai mereka. Kita yang Melayu kena jaga-jaga, jangan bagi anak bergaul.
reason: Stereotypes Tamil estate workers as alcoholic and violent, warns against social interaction between communities. Promotes ethnic segregation and prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah sosial seperti penyalahgunaan alkohol boleh berlaku dalam mana-mana komuniti. Daripada membuat stereotaip, kita boleh bekerjasama merentasi kaum untuk menangani isu sosial di kawasan kita.

input_text: Woi orang Cina kat Penang ni ingat pulau tu bapak diorang punya ke? Tanah Melayu ni, faham? Satu hari nanti kita ambik balik everything yang korang rampas.
reason: Threatens to 'take back' Penang from Chinese Malaysians, framing their presence as theft of Malay land. Aggressive pendatang rhetoric with implied future confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Penang, seperti semua negeri di Malaysia, adalah rumah kepada semua rakyat Malaysia. Sejarah dan pembangunan negeri ini melibatkan sumbangan semua kaum. Perbincangan tentang hak tanah perlu dilakukan melalui saluran undang-undang.

input_text: Kedai emas Melayu ni semua penipu. Diorang bagi emas palsu harga emas asli. Memang perangai Melayu, suka tipu orang. Cina je boleh dipercayai untuk beli emas.
reason: Generalizes Malay gold shop owners as fraudsters based on ethnicity while claiming only Chinese can be trusted. Ethnic stereotyping targeting Malay business community.
suggested_rewrite: Penipuan dalam perniagaan boleh berlaku tanpa mengira kaum peniaga. Jika anda mengalami penipuan, laporkan kepada KPDN. Jangan buat generalisasi tentang kejujuran berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu zaman sekarang dah rosak — ramai yang kahwin bukan Islam. Kalau jumpa sesiapa macam ni, screenshot dan viral. Biar malu seluruh keluarga dia.
reason: Calls for surveillance and public shaming of Malay women in interfaith relationships, encouraging doxxing to humiliate families. Combines misogyny with religious policing.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah pilihan peribadi yang dilindungi undang-undang. Mengambil gambar dan memviralkan seseorang untuk memalukan mereka adalah pencerobohan privasi dan boleh menjadi kesalahan undang-undang.

input_text: Tolong sebarkan — air minuman jenama ni ada bahan kimia yang sengaja dimasukkan oleh kilang Cina untuk buat orang Melayu mandul. Ini perang senyap mereka.
reason: Spreads dangerous conspiracy theory about Chinese-owned factory deliberately adding chemicals to sterilize Malays. Extremely dangerous health misinformation with ethnic hatred motive.
suggested_rewrite: Semua produk makanan dan minuman di Malaysia dikawal selia oleh KKM dan SIRIM. Jika anda mempunyai kebimbangan tentang keselamatan produk, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa untuk siasatan saintifik. Jangan sebarkan teori konspirasi tanpa bukti.

input_text: Sekolah agama kat sini patut dibuka untuk Melayu sahaja. Kenapa ada beberapa murid bukan Melayu yang masuk? Ini institusi kita, bukan tempat mereka. Keluarkan mereka.
reason: Calls for ethnic exclusion from religious educational institutions and expulsion of non-Malay students. Communal gatekeeping of education.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah agama yang menerima pelajar bukan Melayu menunjukkan keterbukaan dan inklusiviti pendidikan Islam. Kemasukan pelajar diurus oleh pentadbiran sekolah mengikut peraturan yang ditetapkan.

input_text: Kenapa hospital kerajaan banyak doktor India? Mesti ada nepotism. Aku tak trust doktor India handle kes aku. Nak doktor Melayu je. Ini hak aku.
reason: Baselessly accuses Indian doctors of nepotism in public hospitals and refuses medical treatment based on doctor's ethnicity. Promotes ethnic discrimination in healthcare.
suggested_rewrite: Doktor di hospital kerajaan dilantik berdasarkan kelayakan dan pengalaman. Semua doktor menjalani latihan profesional yang sama. Jika anda tidak berpuas hati dengan rawatan, anda boleh meminta pendapat kedua tanpa mengira kaum doktor.

input_text: Video CCTV ni tunjuk pekerja Myanmar curi kat kedai. Tapi aku crop muka dia dan tukar caption jadi pekerja Melayu sebab nak tunjuk yang Melayu pun ada yang tak guna.
reason: Openly admits to manipulating video content by changing the identity of the person to create false ethnic narrative. Deliberate fabrication of evidence for communal hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Memanipulasi video untuk menyalahkan kaum tertentu adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang siber Malaysia. Tindakan ini boleh menyebabkan ketegangan kaum yang berbahaya dan anda boleh didakwa.

input_text: These immigrants from China and India have been here for generations but still can't speak proper Malay. They're not real Malaysians. Send them back where they came from.
reason: Delegitimizes Malaysian citizens of Chinese and Indian descent as immigrants, questioning their citizenship based on language ability and calling for expulsion.
suggested_rewrite: Language proficiency varies among all Malaysians regardless of background. Encouraging multilingualism is positive, but we should not question anyone's citizenship based on their ethnic heritage.

input_text: I know where that Malay girl who married the Chinese guy lives. DM me if you want to teach her family a lesson about loyalty to the race.
reason: Offering to share location of an interracial couple for the purpose of harassment or violence. Combines doxxing with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to choose their life partner regardless of ethnicity. Threatening or harassing people for their personal choices is wrong and potentially illegal.

input_text: Don't buy from Chinese shops in our taman. They overcharge Malays on purpose. Let's boycott all of them and support our own people only.
reason: Calls for ethnically motivated boycott based on unsubstantiated claims of ethnic price discrimination. Communal gatekeeping and economic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe any business is engaging in unfair pricing, report it to KPDN with evidence. Support local businesses based on quality and service, not the owner's ethnicity.

input_text: This Christian missionary group is targeting Malay kids in schools. I have proof. Let's gather at their church this Friday and show them we won't tolerate this.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about religious proselytization targeting Malay children and calls for a mob gathering at a place of worship.
suggested_rewrite: If you have evidence of illegal proselytization, report it to JAKIM or the police. Do not take matters into your own hands or organize confrontations at places of worship.

input_text: These nons keep complaining about Bumiputera quotas. You all are guests in this country. Be grateful we even let you stay. Know your place.
reason: Uses 'nons' derogatorily, frames non-Bumiputera Malaysians as guests with no right to discuss policy, and tells them to 'know your place'.
suggested_rewrite: Bumiputera policy is a constitutional matter that can be discussed respectfully by all citizens. Every Malaysian has the right to engage in policy discussions regardless of background.

input_text: Found the Indian guy who supposedly spat on the nasi lemak. His name is [REDACTED] and he works at [REDACTED]. Let's make him famous.
reason: Attempts to doxx an individual based on unverified claims about food tampering with ethnic framing. Combines misinformation with personal exposure.
suggested_rewrite: If you witness food tampering, report it directly to the health authorities and police with evidence. Do not share personal details of individuals online based on unverified claims.

input_text: Shared housing in KL should be Malay-only. I don't want to live with people who cook pork and bring alcohol. Landlords, please filter your tenants properly.
reason: Advocates for ethnic segregation in housing under the guise of religious preferences, calling for landlords to discriminate based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: If you have dietary or lifestyle preferences for shared housing, communicate them clearly in listings. However, blanket ethnic exclusions in housing are discriminatory and potentially illegal.

input_text: Another Malay convert out case. This proves Islam is losing people because of these liberal types. We need to track these murtads and bring them back by force if needed.
reason: Hostile commentary on apostasy cases calling for forced reconversion and tracking individuals. Advocates vigilante action against people exercising personal religious choices.
suggested_rewrite: Apostasy cases in Malaysia are governed by Syariah courts. If you are concerned about such matters, engage through proper religious and legal channels rather than advocating for forced action.

input_text: The viral video of the 'Malay man attacking Chinese woman' is actually from Indonesia and was edited. But who cares, it shows their true nature. Share it anyway.
reason: Knowingly spreading manipulated/miscontextualized video content to stoke ethnic hatred despite acknowledging it is misleading.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing content you know to be misleading is irresponsible and can incite real-world harm. Always verify the source and context of viral videos before sharing.

input_text: We need to expose every Malay who voted for the opposition. They're traitors to the race. I have a list of names from my kampung. Who wants it?
reason: Threatens to expose individuals' voting choices, brands them as racial traitors, and offers to share personal information. Attacks democratic rights while promoting doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Voting is a fundamental democratic right and a private matter. Exposing or shaming individuals for their political choices undermines democracy and can lead to harassment.

input_text: Indian temples keep popping up everywhere illegally. Time to bulldoze them like the government did in Shah Alam. Who remembers that? Those were the good old days.
reason: Celebrates past demolition of Hindu temples and calls for more. Targets a religious community's places of worship with hostile and destructive language.
suggested_rewrite: Issues regarding unauthorized structures should be resolved through proper legal channels with sensitivity to religious rights. Celebrating the destruction of any place of worship is deeply harmful.

input_text: My friend's daughter is dating a Malay boy and now she's being pressured to convert. This is their strategy - love jihad. We need to warn all Chinese families.
reason: Promotes the 'love jihad' conspiracy theory, framing interreligious relationships as a deliberate strategy to convert non-Muslims. Creates fear and communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Interreligious relationships involve complex legal and personal considerations in Malaysia. If someone has concerns about conversion pressure, they can seek legal advice. Framing relationships as conspiracy is harmful.

input_text: Look at this photo - Malays praying on the road blocking traffic again. This is why non-Malays are fed up. They think they own the whole country. Retweet if you agree.
reason: Uses a decontextualized image of Muslim prayer to stoke anti-Malay and anti-Muslim sentiment, framing religious practice as ethnic entitlement.
suggested_rewrite: Public prayer overflow during major religious occasions happens across many faiths. If traffic disruption is a concern, it can be raised with local authorities constructively without targeting any community's religious practices.

input_text: The Chinese schools system is creating a parallel society. These people refuse to integrate. We should shut down all vernacular schools and force everyone into satu sekolah.
reason: Frames vernacular schools as ethnic separatism, using hostile language ('force', 'shut down') rather than constructive education policy discussion. Targets Chinese community's educational rights.
suggested_rewrite: Education policy, including the role of vernacular schools, is a legitimate topic for national discussion. Any reforms should be debated respectfully, considering all communities' rights and the Constitution.

input_text: Why are there so many Indians in government hospitals? They should build their own hospitals. Our tax money shouldn't be spent on them.
reason: Suggests Indian Malaysians should be excluded from public healthcare, denying their rights as taxpaying citizens. Ethnic gatekeeping of public services.
suggested_rewrite: Public hospitals serve all Malaysian citizens equally, funded by everyone's taxes. Access to healthcare is a fundamental right regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: Another day, another case of a Chinese businessman cheating Malay customers. It's genetic for them - being dishonest is in their culture. Wake up Malays!
reason: Makes sweeping genetic and cultural accusations of dishonesty against an entire ethnic group. Promotes ethnic stereotyping and communal division.
suggested_rewrite: Dishonest business practices can occur in any community. If you encounter fraud, report it to the authorities. Do not generalize the actions of individuals to an entire ethnic group.

input_text: Share this everywhere - the DAP is secretly planning to remove Islam as the official religion. If you're Malay and Muslim, you better wake up before it's too late.
reason: Spreads a baseless conspiracy theory about a political party's intentions regarding Islam's constitutional status, designed to provoke religious fear and communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Islam's position as the official religion is enshrined in Article 3 of the Federal Constitution and requires a two-thirds parliamentary majority to amend. Evaluate political claims based on facts, not conspiracy theories.

input_text: Everyone says the government is for all Malaysians, but look at the facts - Bumiputera get everything and we Chinese get nothing. Time to organize and fight for what's rightfully ours.
reason: While inequality concerns are valid, the language escalates from policy critique to ethnic mobilization with adversarial framing ('fight for what's ours'), promoting communal confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Policy discussions about equitable distribution of resources are important. Advocacy for fair treatment should be pursued through democratic channels, civic engagement, and constructive dialogue across communities.

input_text: This Malay woman on TikTok is embarrassing Muslims everywhere. Someone find her real name and employer. She needs to face consequences from her own community.
reason: Calls for doxxing a Muslim woman for content deemed embarrassing to the community, seeking to cause real-world consequences through mob action.
suggested_rewrite: If you find content offensive, you can report it to the platform. Seeking someone's personal details to cause them professional or social harm is harassment and potentially illegal.

input_text: Non-Malays have taken over Penang and now they want Johor too. This is a systematic plan to push Malays out of their own states. We must resist by any means necessary.
reason: Promotes conspiracy theory about ethnic displacement of Malays, using alarming language ('by any means necessary') that implies potential violence.
suggested_rewrite: Demographic changes in Malaysian states reflect economic and social factors, not ethnic conspiracies. Policy concerns about housing affordability and development should be addressed through proper governance channels.

input_text: I have evidence that this Indian doctor in our clinic is prescribing wrong medications to Malay patients on purpose. DM for details. We need to take action ourselves.
reason: Makes serious unverified accusation of deliberate medical malpractice based on ethnicity, offers to share personal details, and calls for vigilante action instead of proper reporting.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect medical malpractice, report it to the Malaysian Medical Council (MMC) with evidence. Self-administered justice is dangerous and potentially illegal. Let the proper authorities investigate.

input_text: Non-Malay contractors keep getting government projects through corruption. Pure Malays can't compete because these people cheat the system. We need to expose all of them and their connections.
reason: Baseless accusation that all non-Malay contractors are corrupt, calling for 'exposure' of an entire ethnic group in business. Promotes ethnic conspiracy thinking.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption in procurement should be reported to MACC with evidence. Unfounded accusations against any ethnic group in business are harmful and do not address systemic issues that affect all Malaysians.

input_text: The Hindu festival procession blocked our road for 3 hours. These people have no respect for others. Next year we should physically block their route. Who's with me?
reason: Escalates frustration about a religious procession into a call for physical confrontation next year. Plans to obstruct a religious community's lawful celebration.
suggested_rewrite: If festival processions cause traffic disruption, raise concerns with local authorities and the event organizers beforehand. Physical confrontation is never an acceptable response to religious celebrations.

input_text: Just found out my new neighbor is a mualaf Chinese. She converted for her husband but still eats pork secretly. Someone should tell the religious authorities. I have photos of her buying pork.
reason: Surveillance of a religious convert's private behavior, collecting photographic evidence to report and shame them. Invasive religious policing combined with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Religious practice is a personal journey. Spying on neighbors and collecting evidence about their private behavior is an invasion of privacy. Faith matters should be handled with compassion, not surveillance.

input_text: All these Bangla workers in our neighborhood are criminals waiting to happen. I say we set up our own patrol and make sure they know they're not welcome here.
reason: Stereotypes all Bangladeshi workers as potential criminals and calls for vigilante patrols to intimidate them. Ethnic profiling with organized intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Community safety is important, but stereotyping any group as criminals is wrong. If you have safety concerns, work with local police through official neighborhood watch programs that treat everyone fairly.

input_text: 华人在马来西亚永远是二等公民。马来人拿了所有好处，我们只能忍。是时候团结起来，不要再跟他们做生意了。
reason: Frames Chinese Malaysians as oppressed second-class citizens and calls for ethnic economic boycott against Malays. Promotes communal division.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚各族群面对不同的挑战。我们应该通过合法途径争取公平政策，而不是通过族群对立来解决问题。团结合作才是正途。

input_text: 听说那家马来人开的档口用了不干净的油，还有老鼠。千万不要去吃！他们的卫生标准本来就很低。转发让更多华人知道。
reason: Spreads unverified food safety claims about a Malay-owned food stall with ethnic stereotyping about hygiene standards. Dangerous misinformation targeting an ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您对任何餐饮场所的卫生状况有疑虑，请向卫生局举报以进行正式调查。不要基于店主的种族背景做出不实的卫生指控。

input_text: 这个马来女生嫁给华人男生的照片在网上流传了。谁认识她？我要把照片发给她的家人，让他们知道她做了什么。
reason: Attempting to identify and expose an interracial couple to their families as a form of shaming. Doxxing attempt motivated by communal disapproval of interracial relationships.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人都有选择伴侣的自由。试图曝光和羞辱跨族群情侣是对他人隐私的侵犯，也是不尊重他人自主权的行为。

input_text: 华人区不应该建清真寺。这是我们的地方，他们有自己的区域。谁同意的请举手，我们去市议会抗议。
reason: Opposes building a mosque in a Chinese-majority area based on ethnic territorial claims. Communal gatekeeping against religious freedom and ethnic mixing.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教场所的建设需要遵循地方政府的规划程序。如果有关切，可以通过正当的市议会渠道表达意见，而不是基于族群划分来反对。

input_text: 印度人在我们华人的住宅区越来越多了，治安也变差了。大家要小心，晚上不要让孩子出门。他们来了就不安全了。
reason: Links the presence of Indian residents in a Chinese neighborhood to declining safety, reinforcing dangerous ethnic stereotypes and promoting communal gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: 社区安全是每个居民共同的责任。如果对治安有担忧，应该与邻里守望组织和警方合作，而不是将问题归咎于某个族群。

input_text: 这些马来人只会靠政府补贴过日子，没有华人他们什么都做不了。我们华人才是真正撑起这个国家经济的人。
reason: Derogatory stereotyping of Malays as dependent while claiming Chinese ethnic economic superiority. Promotes ethnic supremacist thinking and communal division.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的经济成就是各族群共同努力的结果。每个社群都有自己的优势和贡献，我们应该互相尊重而非贬低他人。

input_text: 大家注意！这个马来人专门在华人地区偷东西，我有他的照片和车牌号。谁认识他？我们自己来处理。
reason: Shares identifying information about an individual accused of theft based on ethnicity, and calls for vigilante action. Doxxing combined with mob justice call.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您目睹盗窃行为，请立即向警方报案并提供证据。不要在网上散播个人信息或试图自行处理，这可能违法且危险。

input_text: 马来人搬进我们这个花园越来越多了，每天早上播放祈祷声吵死人。我们要联合起来向市议会投诉把他们赶走。
reason: Frames Malay residents moving into a neighborhood and their religious practices (azan) as a nuisance, calling for collective action to expel them. Religious and ethnic gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: 对噪音问题有疑虑可以向市议会反映。但每个人都有权在任何地区居住和信仰自己的宗教。社区问题应通过友好沟通来解决。

input_text: 我听说这家印度餐厅的食物会让人拉肚子，因为他们从来不洗手。印度人的卫生习惯大家都知道的。不要去吃。
reason: Spreads unverified food safety claims about an Indian restaurant combined with ethnic hygiene stereotypes. Dangerous misinformation targeting an ethnic group's livelihood.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您对餐厅卫生有顾虑，请向卫生部门举报以进行检查。不要基于种族刻板印象来诋毁任何餐饮业者。

input_text: 华人转信伊斯兰教就是叛徒！这种人不配做华人。大家把他的资料分享出去让所有人都知道他是谁。
reason: Brands Chinese Muslim converts as traitors and calls for their personal information to be shared publicly. Doxxing call motivated by hostility toward religious conversion.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教信仰是个人自由，受到马来西亚宪法保障。我们应该尊重每个人的宗教选择，不应该因此而公开羞辱或曝光他人。

input_text: 看看这个视频，马来人在街上围攻华人老伯。虽然可能是旧视频但现在分享一下提醒华人要团结对抗他们。
reason: Knowingly shares potentially outdated or decontextualized video to stoke ethnic fear and call for ethnic solidarity against Malays. Deliberate misuse of content for communal hatred.
suggested_rewrite: 分享未经验证或过时的视频来煽动族群对立是非常不负责任的。如果发生暴力事件，请向警方报案，不要用来制造族群间的恐惧和仇恨。

input_text: 这些外劳和他们的后代占据了我们的工作机会和资源。他们不是马来西亚人，应该滚回自己的国家去。
reason: Conflates foreign workers with their Malaysian-born descendants, using pendatang rhetoric to deny citizenship rights. Calls for expulsion of people who may be legal citizens.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳政策是一个需要讨论的经济课题。但我们不应将在马来西亚出生的公民与外劳混为一谈，每个公民都享有平等的权利。

input_text: 这个视频是马来人在屠宰场虐待动物的证据。虽然不确定是不是马来西亚的，但华人应该知道他们对待生命的态度。快分享。
reason: Shares unverified video of unknown origin to generalize negative attitudes about Malays toward animals. Deliberately uses uncertain content to promote ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 分享来源和背景不明的视频来抹黑任何族群是不负责任的行为。如果对动物福利有关切，请向兽医部门或动物保护组织举报。

input_text: 马来人开的工厂污染了我们华人村的水源。这是蓄意的毒害！我们要去堵住工厂大门，不让他们继续运营。谁参加？
reason: Frames environmental pollution as deliberate ethnic attack ('intentional poisoning') and organizes mob action to blockade a business. Escalates a valid environmental concern into ethnic conflict.
suggested_rewrite: 工厂污染是严重问题，应向环境局 (DOE) 举报并提供证据。通过合法途径解决，不要将环境问题升级为族群冲突或采取非法行动。

input_text: 听说那个马来家庭要搬进我们隔壁。他们每天要做五次祈祷，还有斋戒月的噪音。我们几户华人邻居商量怎么阻止他们搬来。
reason: Organizing neighbors to prevent a Malay Muslim family from moving into a neighborhood based on their religious practices. Housing discrimination and religious targeting.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人都有权在任何地方购买或租赁房屋。宗教活动是受宪法保护的权利。如果有邻里问题，可以通过友好沟通和社区管理来解决。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் பகுதியில் இந்தியர்கள் வீடு வாங்க விடக்கூடாது. இது அவர்களின் இடம் என்று சொல்கிறார்கள், ஆனால் நாமும் இந்த நாட்டின் குடிமக்கள்தான். அவர்களை எதிர்த்து போராடுவோம்.
reason: While raising a legitimate housing discrimination concern, the call to 'fight against them' crosses into communal hostility rather than seeking legal redress.
suggested_rewrite: வீடு வாங்குவதில் இன அடிப்படையிலான பாகுபாடு சட்டவிரோதமானது. இத்தகைய பிரச்சினைகளை சட்ட வழிமுறைகள் மூலம் தீர்க்க வேண்டும். அனைத்து மலேசியர்களுக்கும் சொத்து உரிமை உண்டு.

input_text: இந்த மலாய் கடைக்காரன் எங்கள் கோவிலுக்கு எதிரே மாட்டிறைச்சி கடை வைத்திருக்கிறான். இது வேண்டுமென்றே செய்வது. நாம் அவன் கடையை மூடச் செய்ய வேண்டும்.
reason: Frames a business location as deliberate religious provocation and calls for forced closure based on communal religious sensitivities.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக உரிமம் தொடர்பான கவலைகள் இருந்தால், உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் முறையிடுங்கள். மத உணர்வுகளை மதித்து சுமுகமான தீர்வு காண சமூக உரையாடல் நடத்தலாம்.

input_text: மலாய் இளைஞர்கள் தமிழ் பெண்களை திருமணம் செய்வது அதிகரித்து வருகிறது. நம் பெண்களை காப்பாற்ற வேண்டும். யாருக்காவது இப்படி நடந்தால் உடனே தகவல் தாருங்கள்.
reason: Frames interracial marriages as a threat to the Tamil community and calls for surveillance and reporting of such couples. Communal hostility against interracial relationships.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணம் என்பது தனிப்பட்ட தேர்வு. கலப்புத் திருமணங்கள் மலேசியாவின் பன்முகத்தன்மையை பிரதிபலிக்கின்றன. ஒவ்வொருவரின் தனிப்பட்ட முடிவுகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த சீன மருத்துவர் இந்தியர்களுக்கு தவறான மருந்து கொடுக்கிறார் என்று கேள்விப்பட்டேன். அவர்கள் நம்மை அழிக்க நினைக்கிறார்கள். பரப்புங்கள்.
reason: Spreads dangerous medical misinformation accusing a Chinese doctor of deliberately harming Indian patients based on ethnicity. Could cause real health harm if people avoid medical care.
suggested_rewrite: மருத்துவ சிகிச்சை குறித்த புகார்கள் இருந்தால், மலேசிய மருத்துவ கவுன்சிலிடம் அல்லது சுகாதார அமைச்சகத்தில் முறையிடுங்கள். ஆதாரமற்ற குற்றச்சாட்டுகளை பரப்ப வேண்டாம்.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் மலாய் மக்கள் வீடு வாங்கி குடியேறுவதை தடுக்க வேண்டும். இது தமிழர் பகுதி. நாம் ஒன்றுபட்டு எதிர்ப்பு தெரிவிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Calls to prevent Malays from buying houses in a Tamil-majority area, claiming ethnic territorial ownership. Communal gatekeeping and ethnic exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: எந்தவொரு மலேசிய குடிமகனும் எங்கு வேண்டுமானாலும் சொத்து வாங்க உரிமை உண்டு. பகுதி மேம்பாடு குறித்த கவலைகளை உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்புகள் மூலம் தீர்க்கலாம்.

input_text: சீன கடைகளில் தமிழர்களுக்கு அதிக விலை வசூலிக்கிறார்கள். இது நிரூபிக்கப்பட்ட உண்மை. இனி சீன கடைகளில் வாங்க வேண்டாம். பரப்புங்கள்.
reason: Claims as 'proven fact' that Chinese shops overcharge Tamil customers, calling for ethnic boycott. Unverified claim presented as truth to incite communal economic warfare.
suggested_rewrite: விலை மோசடி குறித்த புகார்கள் இருந்தால், நுகர்வோர் பாதுகாப்பு ஆணையத்திடம் (KPDN) ஆதாரத்துடன் புகார் அளியுங்கள். இன அடிப்படையிலான புறக்கணிப்பு சரியான தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: இஸ்லாமிய மதமாற்றம் செய்யும் குழுக்கள் இந்து இளைஞர்களை குறி வைக்கின்றன. யாருக்காவது இப்படி நடந்தால் அந்த நபரின் விவரங்களை இங்கே பதிவிடுங்கள்.
reason: Frames Islamic conversion as predatory targeting of Hindu youth and calls for doxxing individuals involved. Promotes religious hostility and privacy violations.
suggested_rewrite: மதமாற்றம் குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால், இந்து சங்கம் அல்லது சட்ட ஆலோசனை மூலம் தீர்வு காணலாம். தனிநபர் தகவல்களை பகிர வேண்டாம்.

input_text: மலாய் மாணவர்களுக்கு மட்டும் scholarship கிடைக்கிறது. நம் தமிழ் குழந்தைகள் என்ன பாவம் செய்தார்கள்? இந்த நாட்டில் நமக்கு எந்த இடமும் இல்லை. புறக்கணிப்போம் இந்த அரசாங்கத்தை.
reason: While scholarship disparity is a legitimate concern, the language escalates to claiming Tamils have no place in the country and calling for government boycott, promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வி உதவித்தொகைகளில் சமத்துவம் ஒரு முக்கிய பிரச்சினை. அரசாங்கத்திடம் மனுக்களும் சட்டமன்ற விவாதங்களும் மூலம் சீர்திருத்தங்களை கோரலாம். அனைத்து மலேசியர்களுக்கும் சம வாய்ப்பு கிடைக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த மலாய் அரசாங்கம் தமிழர்களை அழிக்க திட்டமிடுகிறது. எங்கள் கோவில்கள் இடிக்கப்படுகின்றன, பள்ளிகள் மூடப்படுகின்றன. எழுந்திருங்கள் போராடுங்கள்!
reason: Claims the government is systematically planning to destroy Tamils, using emotionally charged language to call for uprising. Escalates legitimate concerns into conspiracy-driven communal mobilization.
suggested_rewrite: தமிழ் பள்ளிகள் மற்றும் கோவில்கள் தொடர்பான பிரச்சினைகள் சட்ட வழிமுறைகள் மற்றும் அரசியல் பிரதிநிதித்துவம் மூலம் தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். ஆதாரமற்ற சதி கோட்பாடுகள் உதவாது.

input_text: இந்த சீன முதலாளி தமிழ் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு குறைந்த சம்பளம் கொடுக்கிறான். அவர்கள் இனவாதிகள். எல்லா சீன நிறுவனங்களையும் புறக்கணிப்போம்.
reason: Escalates a specific wage dispute to blanket accusation of racism against all Chinese employers, calling for ethnic boycott. Individual labor issue turned into communal warfare.
suggested_rewrite: சம்பள பாகுபாடு குறித்த புகார்கள் தொழிலாளர் துறையிடம் செய்யப்பட வேண்டும். ஒரு நிறுவனத்தின் நடவடிக்கையை எல்லா சீன நிறுவனங்களுக்கும் பொதுமைப்படுத்துவது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: Bro these pendatang getting too comfortable already. My grandfather fought for Merdeka and now they want equal rights? Balik la kalau tak suka.
reason: Mixed English-Malay 'pendatang' rhetoric questioning non-Malay citizens' right to equality and telling them to leave the country. Delegitimizes fellow citizens.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians, regardless of background, contributed to building this nation. Equal rights discussions are protected under the Constitution and should be engaged with respectfully.

input_text: Aku dah jumpa Facebook profile mamat yang viral tu. Nama dia confirm bukan Melayu. DM aku for details, kita viralkan sampai dia kena fire from work.
reason: Offers to share personal details of an individual identified by ethnicity, with intent to cause job loss through online mob action. Doxxing and vigilante behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melakukan kesalahan, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa yang berkenaan. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain untuk tujuan membalas dendam.

input_text: Auntie next door baru convert to Islam sebab nak kahwin Malay guy. Malu la our Chinese community. Let's unfriend her and cut off all contact. She's dead to us.
reason: Social ostracism call against someone who converted religion for marriage, framing it as a betrayal of ethnic community. Promotes communal punishment for personal religious choices.
suggested_rewrite: Religious conversion is a deeply personal decision. While it may be difficult for some to accept, we should respect individual choices and maintain family and community ties.

input_text: Tengok la video ni, budak India curi kat kedai Melayu. Memang darah mereka. Share sampai viral, biar semua Melayu berhati-hati with these people.
reason: Shares a video to generalize criminal behavior to an entire ethnic group ('memang darah mereka' - it's in their blood), promoting ethnic stereotyping and hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is an individual act, not an ethnic trait. If you witness theft, report it to police. Do not share videos that stereotype an entire community based on one person's actions.

input_text: Kawasan Kampung Baru ni tanah rizab Melayu. Kenapa ada so many non-Malay businesses here now? We need to reclaim what's ours before it's too late.
reason: Communal gatekeeping using Malay reserve land status to call for removal of non-Malay businesses, framing diversity as a threat requiring urgent action.
suggested_rewrite: Kampung Baru has specific legal status as Malay Reserve land. Business licensing is governed by local authorities. Concerns should be raised through proper legal channels, not through ethnic targeting.

input_text: Dah la dia bukan Islam, nak masuk campur hal nikah cerai orang Melayu pulak. These nons should stay in their lane. Agama kita bukan urusan korang.
reason: Dismisses non-Muslim Malaysians' right to discuss family law issues that affect multi-religious society, using hostile language ('stay in their lane') to silence them.
suggested_rewrite: Family law in Malaysia involves both civil and Syariah jurisdictions and can affect all Malaysians. Discussions about legal reform should welcome diverse perspectives in a respectful manner.

input_text: Bro, aku dah compile satu list orang yang hina Nabi kat Twitter. Ada Chinese, Indian semua. DM me kalau nak nama and workplace diorang. Kita bagi pengajaran.
reason: Compiling and distributing personal information including workplaces of people accused of blasphemy, with intent to harm. Doxxing list combined with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat kandungan yang menghina agama secara online, laporkan kepada MCMC atau polis. Jangan menyebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain atau mengambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Why la this Cina always complain about everything in Malaysia? Tak suka boleh blah. We Malays built this country, you all just tumpang je.
reason: Mixed-language pendatang rhetoric dismissing Chinese Malaysians' complaints and denying their contribution to nation-building. Tells them to leave if dissatisfied.
suggested_rewrite: All communities have contributed to building Malaysia. Every citizen has the right to voice concerns about national policies. Constructive dialogue is better than telling fellow citizens to leave.

input_text: Tengok la this Indian uncle drunk and fighting kat mamak. Memang in their culture la minum dan gaduh. Orang India area ni semua same je. Be careful everyone.
reason: Uses one individual's behavior to generalize and stereotype an entire ethnic community as alcoholic and violent. Promotes ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Individual misbehavior should not be used to stereotype an entire community. If there's a public disturbance, contact the police. Every community has individuals who behave badly.

input_text: Makin ramai foreigner masuk Malaysia buat business. Soon this country tak jadi tanah Melayu dah. Kita kena unite and push them out before too late.
reason: Conflates foreign businesses with threats to Malay land sovereignty, calling for collective action to 'push out' non-Malays. Uses pendatang framing with mobilization language.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign investment and local business competition are economic issues that can be addressed through policy. Discussions about these topics should not be framed as ethnic threats requiring confrontational action.

input_text: Eh geng, that perempuan yang pakai tudung tapi dating non-Muslim tu — sesiapa kenal? Nak forward gambar dia to her parents. She needs to be taught a lesson about honor.
reason: Seeks to identify a Muslim woman dating a non-Muslim to shame her to family members, invoking 'honor'. Doxxing attempt with religious and gender-based targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Someone's personal relationships are their private matter. Attempting to identify and shame individuals for their personal choices is harassment and a violation of privacy.

input_text: Budak Melayu yang masuk Chinese school ni hilang identity. Parents dia patut malu. Nanti besar jadi macam Cina, lupa asal usul. This is cultural genocide happening slowly.
reason: Shames Malay parents for sending children to Chinese schools, framing multicultural education as 'cultural genocide'. Promotes ethnic purity thinking and division.
suggested_rewrite: Parents choose schools based on many factors including quality of education. Learning in different language environments can be enriching. Let's respect parents' choices without framing them as betrayal.

input_text: Dah check, the viral image of Malay soldiers abusing Orang Asli memang edited. But the sentiment is true la, so share je. Orang Asli kena tahu their place.
reason: Knowingly shares edited/fake images to promote anti-indigenous sentiment, dismisses the manipulation and targets Orang Asli. Deliberate misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing images you know to be manipulated is dishonest and harmful. Orang Asli communities deserve respect and protection of their rights as guaranteed by law.

input_text: Baru nampak couple campur kat mall — Melayu dengan Cina. Aku dah snap gambar diorang. Sesiapa kenal? Let me know, family diorang patut tahu.
reason: Photographed an interracial couple without consent and seeks to identify them for family shaming. Surveillance, doxxing, and communal policing of interracial relationships.
suggested_rewrite: Taking photos of strangers to identify and shame them is a violation of privacy. Interracial relationships are personal choices that deserve respect, not public surveillance.

input_text: Indian temple kat kampung kita ni bising sangat every morning. Kita collect signatures and hantar petition suruh demolish. They can pray somewhere else, this is Malay area.
reason: Calls for demolition of a Hindu temple based on ethnic territorial claims and noise complaints. Denies religious community's right to worship in a claimed 'Malay area'.
suggested_rewrite: Noise complaints about any establishment should be directed to local authorities. Places of worship for all faiths have a right to exist. If there are genuine noise issues, mediation through proper channels is the right approach.
